prompt: Generate a screenshot of a video conferencing app where the two friends from the reference images are in a video call interface.
prompt_refined: Generate a realistic full-screen screenshot of a modern video conferencing application interface. The primary video panel, on the left side of the screen, should feature the individual from image 1 (Dwayne 'The Rock' Johnson), engaged and smiling. In the top-right corner, a smaller secondary video panel should display the individual from image 2 (Brad Pitt), also with a friendly expression. The overall composition should depict two friends in an active video call, complete with typical video conferencing UI elements like mute/unmute buttons, camera toggles, and call controls at the bottom of the screen.
objects: Primary video panel on the left side
Smaller secondary video panel in the top-right corner
Mute/unmute buttons at the bottom of the screen
Camera toggles at the bottom of the screen
Call controls at the bottom of the screen
